**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Triggering the dual ultimate circuit breaker of the cultural tourism town extremum and Extreme Scope Stuffing. The fabricated Apple global supply chain OEM template in the original data has been uprooted. This is an enterprise that can be called a 'mudslide' in the commercial world: named 'Dafanshu (Big Sweet Potato) Smart Technology,' officially classified as 'Electronic Device Manufacturing.' Its business license runs four to five hundred words long, resembling an encyclopedia of heavy industry, catching everything from 'automatic control instruments' to 'gear transmissions, hydraulic equipment,' and then to 'robots, smart equipment,' and even 'integrated circuit production' and 'IoT big data.' However, the forensic logic engine directly intercepted its laughable physical bottom line: the insured headcount is only 1 person! The paid-in capital is a mere 200,000 RMB. Even more devastating is its registered address: 'Room 3901, Zone G, Building 10, Yaxi International Slow City Town, Gaochun District.' 'Yaxi International Slow City' is a famous rural cultural tourism/agritainment specialty town in Nanjing; this address is highly likely a shop, a B&B guest room, or a cultural and creative cubicle within the town. Inside a room in a cultural tourism town, a solo boss acting as a bare commander, holding 200,000 RMB, claims to establish an invincible heavy industry empire spanning hydraulic machinery, robot manufacturing, and chip production? This is not merely an insult to industrial common sense, but a 'cyber boast' full of magical realism. Piercing through all the lies about 'manufacturing and R&D,' the probe locked onto its true survival skills: 'sales of electronic products, hardware and electrical equipment; internet information services.' The truth is incredibly real and ironic: this is absolutely not a heavy industry smart manufacturing base, but a 1-Person Tourist Town Shell & E-commerce Broker operating an agritainment studio. The boss likely just rented a house in the Slow City town, enjoying the pastoral scenery while reselling hardware and electronic products online, or doing some small self-media/internet business. All of its 'industrial giant' tags have been subjected to deep formatting and ruthless demotion by the system.
